checkedConditions: Shared provider/model concurrency helper gates active provider calls with an async semaphore and records wait metadata.
OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenRouter acquire the shared permit after rate-limit cooldown and before outbound retry loop execution.
cargo fmt --check, cargo check -p jcode --lib, and git diff --check passed.
uncheckedConditions: Shared provider/model concurrency helper gates active provider calls with an async semaphore and exposes wait metadata for status/logging.
Tests cover limit-one contention and release behavior for scoped provider/model concurrency.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Backpressure is in-process, provider/model scoped, default limit 2, and can be disabled with JCODE_PROVIDER_MAX_CONCURRENT_PER_MODEL=0.
